channel.title: Multimodal Communication
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Multimodal Communication

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-frontmatter3

item.title: The salience of students’ body language during in-person and online lectures at a Canadian university
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2023-0062

item.title: “Let’s talk divorce”: a multimodal critical discourse analysis of Oduduwa secessionist discourse
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2023-0101

item.title: A multimodal analysis of the English-to-Arabic adaptation of Disney’s “The Bare Necessities”
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0011

item.title: Investigating pausing and gesturing patterns in children with and without developmental language disorder
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0025

item.title: Language politics and prestige in The Walled City: an exploratory study of the linguistic landscape of Intramuros, Manila
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0015

item.title: Harmony in diversity: exploring cross-linguistic, cross-cultural and multimodal dimensions of temporality within tourism discourse
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0019

item.title: The semiotics of red-tagging: hateful affects against the community pantry movement
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0028

item.title: Age and gender differences in meme humor: a multimodal variationist mixed-method approach
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0051

item.title: Imagined versus practiced professional identity development: a multimodal (inter)action analysis of a Chinese novice english teacher
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0043

item.title: Adapting and extending multimodal (inter)action analysis to investigate synchronous multimodal online language teaching
item.description: Article by Ciara R. Wigham, Müge Satar DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mc-2024-0048
